calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Aug-01-2017 Vacated

Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And Imposing Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-31-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And Imposing Monetary Sanctions is taken off calendar per the request of the moving party by way of e-mail to the court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/hk

Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And Imposing Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-24-2017 Continued To May-31-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
John G. Roussas, of Cutter Law PC, Tel. 916.290.9400, for plaintiffs, appearing via CourtCall;
Jonathan Beltran, of Homan & Stone, Tel. 909.307.9380, for defendants, appearing via CourtCall.

Ruling: A R G U E D. Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And Imposing Monetary Sanctions is continued to May 31, 2017, at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302. Defendants will provide further responses to plaintiffs request for admissions and interrogatories today. The parties are instructed to meet and confer after reponses are received. The Court awards $560. in sanctions against Mr. Jarquin, to be paid within 14 days. If all issues have been resolved, the parties may take the matter off calendar. Prevailing party shall prepare form of order that complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189; Dept. 302.

Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And Imposing Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar May-11-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: ATTY JOHN G. ROUSSAS OF CUTTER LAW PC TEL NO. 916-290-9400 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF VIA COURT CALL;
ATTY JONATHAN BELTRAM OF HOMAN AND STONE TEL NO. 909-307-9380 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT VIA COURT CALL.

RULING- DEFENDANT DID NOT STIPULATE FOR THE JUDGE PRO TEM TO HEAR THE MATTER. Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And Imposing Monetary Sanctions IS CONTINUED TO MAY 24 2017 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 302. Judge Pro tem: Rebecca Woodson; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Not Reported.=302/JPT.

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And Imposing Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Apr-06-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, The Court adopted it's tentative ruling; PLAINTIFF KAREN OOSTERMAN'S Motion For Order Deeming Admitted Truth Of Facts And Imposing Monetary Sanctions is continued for further hearing at 9:00 am on May 11, 2017 before Hon. James H. Fleming in this department. On or before May 1, 2017, counsel to defendant Jarquin shall submit a detailed declaration of his efforts to contact Mr. Jarquin. Plaintiff's counsel may file a memorandum regarding said submission on or before May 7, 2017 and shall submit a courtesy copy to the Court and via email to jameshfleming@gmail.com. Judge Pro tem: James Fleming; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany; Not Reported.=302/JPT.
